title: add remaining tier pollen panel to tier-costs dashboard
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Economy watch
gist.blurb: Upgraded our internal dashboards to track the flow of Pollen in real-time. We can now see exactly how fast the hive is buzzing.
gist.summary: Added a stacked bar chart panel to the internal tier-costs dashboard to visualize remaining pollen budgets across active users.
gist.impact: Gives the team better visibility into economy health and tier depletion rates.
gist.visual_concept: The robot mascot (who loves screens) analyzing a new data chart. The chart represents the 'honey reserves' (pollen). The bee is supervising.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art of the robot mascot pointing at a large glowing chart showing stacked bars of pollen usage. The bee mascot floats nearby with a tiny clipboard. Lime green (#ecf874) and soft pastel background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi sci-fi control room vibes. Text in pixel font: 'METRICS'. Nostalgic and clean.
